contracts.title: Context schema module
contracts.note: ensureContextSchema, getOrCreateActiveContext, updateContextHead, archiveContext, rotateSessionContext all implemented.

contracts.title: Wire context into conversation creation
contracts.note: getOrCreateConversation calls getOrCreateActiveContext after conversation creation.

contracts.title: Wire context_id into message writes
contracts.note: recordMessage accepts contextId; sets context_id, parent_id, depth on INSERT; calls updateContextHead. Phase 2 parent_id/depth fields also wired here.

contracts.title: Wire caller chain in HyperMem facade
contracts.note: recordUserMessage and recordAssistantMessage resolve active context and pass contextId to recordMessage.

contracts.title: Backfill existing conversations
contracts.note: backfillContexts and backfillParentChains implemented. Phase 2 parent_id/depth backfill is bundled here alongside Phase 1 context backfill.

contracts.title: Schema init hook + tests
contracts.note: ensureContextSchema exported from index.ts; compositor uses getActiveContext and getHistoryByDAGWalk for DAG-native reads (Phase 3 read paths also shipped).

phases_complete: Phase 3 (DAG-native reads in compositor, scoped FTS/keystones)
phase_summary.note: Phases 1–3 were implemented together. The compositor uses getHistoryByDAGWalk for warm, refreshRedisGradient, and getHistory; FTS and keystone recall are scoped by context_id. Stable-prefix assembly and cache boundary marker (CACHE_PREFIX_BOUNDARY_SLOT) are also in place in the compositor, with cache_control applied by provider-translator.

next_phase.title: Cache-prefix signal propagation, window cache integration, and end-to-end cache_control boundary verification
scope: Propagate prefixHash signal into cache invalidation and warm-start decisions so stale window cache entries with a mismatched stable prefix are evicted.
Integrate window cache read/write paths with the stable-prefix boundary so cache hits respect prefix hash consistency.
End-to-end verification that cache_control: {type: 'ephemeral'} is correctly placed at the CACHE_PREFIX_BOUNDARY_SLOT in real Anthropic provider calls.
